mapper.select:
select riw.*, s.real_name,ri.index_name,ipom.push_object_name push_object_name,s3.real_name appr_person_name from report_index_warning_log riw left join sys_user s on s.user_id =riw.create_user_id left join report_index ri on ri.index_id = riw.warning_index_id left join im_push_object_manage ipom on ipom.manage_id = riw.push_object_id left join sys_user s3 on s3.user_id = riw.appr_person_id where 1=1
and riw.create_user_id = #{loginUserId}
and ri.index_name like concat('%',#{reportIndexWarningLog.indexName},'%')
and riw.warning_name like concat('%',#{reportIndexWarningLog.warningName},'%')
order by riw.create_time desc
